notes: Cataloged from lyrics provided. Structure: Chorus → Verse 1 (Mass of Man) → Chorus → Verse 2 (Bingx) → Chorus → Outro. Two-verse trade-off. Chorus captures cycling through doctors, emotional volatility, feeling like a time bomb. Mass of Man's verse: therapy metaphor, tattooed, hungry, exotic phenomenon. Bingx's verse: 'calm down' trigger, medication making him feel 'average,' alcohol coping, apologies never landing. Outro degraded — screws loose motif.
